title: Judge latency p95 over SLO (simple problems)
summary: Standard-problem judge p95 latency has exceeded the 15s SLO for 10m. NoData maps to OK (an idle window has no observations); a dead judging tier is caught by the nojv-submissions-stuck positive signal instead.

title: Judge latency p95 over SLO (advanced problems)
summary: Advanced-mode judge p95 latency has exceeded the 60s SLO for 10m. NoData maps to OK (an idle window has no observations); a dead judging tier is caught by the nojv-submissions-stuck positive signal instead.

title: Submissions stuck in a non-terminal state
slo: No submission sits pending/judging past the sweeper timeout
summary: One or more submissions have sat in a non-terminal (pending/judging) state past the pending-timeout for 10m — the positive signal for a dead judging tier that judge-latency NoData alone can mask. Placeholder expr: requires a SQL/exporter-backed gauge nojv_submissions_stuck (count of submissions in a non-terminal state older than the pending timeout). Sits in NoData until that exporter is wired; see docs/operations/RELIABILITY.md.

title: API latency p99 over SLO
summary: API p99 latency has exceeded the 500ms SLO for 10m.

title: Scoreboard update latency p95 over SLO
summary: Scoreboard update p95 latency has exceeded the 3s SLO for 10m.

title: SSE connection drop rate over SLO
summary: Server-side SSE connection drop rate has exceeded the 0.5% SLO.

title: HTTP 5xx error rate above availability SLO
summary: HTTP 5xx error rate has exceeded 1% for 5 minutes — service availability SLO is breached. Page on-call immediately.

title: Node filesystem usage over 80%
summary: A node filesystem has exceeded 80% usage for 10m. This is the detection gap behind the 2026-07-04 disk-full incident (containerd wedged → CNPG evicted). Free disk (crictl rmi --prune) or expand the volume before it fills. Requires observability.prometheus.nodeExporter.enabled.

title: Postgres (CloudNativePG) instance not ready
slo: Database availability - all CNPG instances reachable
summary: One or more CloudNativePG Postgres instances failed scrape (not ready) for 2m. Postgres is the single durable store — a down instance means degraded or total outage. Dormant until a CNPG metrics scrape target (job=cnpg-postgres) is wired; see docs/operations/RELIABILITY.md.

title: Postgres backup older than 26h
slo: Backup freshness - last successful base backup < 26h old
summary: The most recent CloudNativePG base backup is over 26h old (daily schedule + margin). Harmless while backups are off (metric absent → no data → OK); fires only once postgres.cnpg.backup.enabled is set and the CNPG metrics are scraped. See docs/runbooks/backup-restore.md.

title: Notification email exhausted delivery retries
slo: No notification email durable work reaches the dead state
summary: An at-least-once notification email exhausted its database-owned retries. Inspect the DurableWork lastError/result and SMTP health. A stable Message-ID helps recipients deduplicate retries but does not provide exactly-once delivery.
